question:
Will Al Riyadh Saudi Club win on 2025-11-21?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 21, 2025
If Al Riyadh Saudi Club wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.slstat.com/

evidences.title: Al Nassr vs. Al Hilal Head-to-Head Record: Which Club Dominates the Rivalry - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: Historically, Al Hilal remain the dominant force in the rivalry, but the gap between the clubs has narrowed significantly in recent years, especially since Cristiano Ronaldo’s arrival at Al Nassr in 2023. ## Al Nassr vs. Al Hilal head-to-head record According to BBC Sport statistics ahead of the latest Riyadh derby: Al Hilal have won 38 of the 67 official meetings between the clubs. Al Nassr have won 14 matches. 15 matches have ended in draws. In Saudi Pro League meetings specifically: Al Hilal have won 14 of the previous 29 league meetings. Al Nassr are still searching for their first league title since 2019. Al Hilal have won a record 19 Saudi Pro League titles, compared to 10 for Al Nassr. Recent meetings, however, tell a much tighter story. Since 2019: [...] Al Hilal have scored 100 goals Al Nassr have scored 63 goals Some of Derby's biggest results include: Al Hilal 5-1 Al Nassr (May 2017): the biggest result of the Saudi Pro League modern era. Al Nassr 0-4 Al Hilal (March 2022) Al Nassr 1-4 Al Hilal (August 2024): Al Hilal dominated the Saudi Super Cup Final. Those big losses aside, Al Nassr’s recent surge has totally changed the narrative, making this rivalry way more com...

evidences.title: Saudi Pro League | History, Format, Sponsorship, Investment, Cristiano Ronaldo, Neymar, Karim Benzema, Lionel Messi, & Facts | Britannica
evidences.content: ## Format Each club plays the other 17 league teams twice a season in home and away fixtures, for a total of 34 games. The season lasts from late August to May of the following year. Clubs get three points for a win, one for a draw, and zero points for a loss. At the end of each season, the club with the most points wins the title. At the end of the season, the bottom three clubs are relegated to the Saudi First Division League, and the top three clubs from the First Division League are promoted to the SPL. ## History [...] SPL Title Winners | season | title winner | | Source: Transfermarkt. | | | 2008–09 | Al-Ittihad Club | | 2009–10 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2010–11 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2011–12 | Al-Shabab FC | | 2012–13 | Al-Fateh SC | | 2013–14 | Al-Nassr FC | | 2014–15 | Al-Nassr FC | | 2015–16 | Al-Ahli SFC | | 2016–17 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2017–18 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2018–19 | Al-Nassr FC | | 2019–20 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2020–21 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2021–22 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2022–23 | Al-Ittihad Club | | 2023–24 | Al-Hilal SFC | | 2024–25 | Al-Ittihad Club | Sanat Pai Raikar football Introduction & Top Questions History + The early years + Professionalism + International organization Foo...

evidences.title: xGaura — Free Football Stats, xG Predictions & Betting Tools
evidences.content: xGaura's mathematical predictions use the Poisson distribution model, a well-established statistical method used widely in sports analytics. The model takes each team's average goals scored and conceded over their most recent 38 matches, adjusts for home advantage and Elo rating strength, then calculates the probability of every possible scoreline. From this, we derive: 1X2 probabilities — the percentage chance of a home win, draw or away win. Over/under probabilities — the likelihood of the match producing more or fewer than 2.5 goals. BTTS probability — the chance that both teams score at least once. Most likely scorelines — the four highest-probability exact scores for each fixture. [...] The most significant development in football statistics over the last decade is expected goals (xG). Rather than counting goals scored, xG measures the quality of each shot by assigning a probability score between 0 and 1 based on factors including shot location, the angle to goal, the type of assist, and whether the shot was taken with the head or foot. A shot from six yards with a central angle might have an xG of 0.75, meaning it would be expected to result in a goal 75% of the time from...

At the time you cancel an appointment, Prometric will require a credit card payment to collect the fee. Late Cancellation/Reschedule Fee (Within Two Business Days): If you reschedule or cancel an appointment within two business days of a scheduled appointment or fail to show up, you will be assessed a fee equal to the cost of the exam. [...] ## Inclement Weather Policy If severe weather or a natural disaster makes it difficult or unsafe to travel to the exam center, the exam may be delayed or cancelled. Visit the Prometric Site Closure page or call (800) 578-6273 for a list of centers closed due to inclement weather. ## Reschedule / Cancellation Policy Cancelling or rescheduling will be considered timely if it is handled according to the cancellation/reschedule timeline below. evidences.title: LSAT Score Cancellations | The Law School Admission Council
evidences.content: 11. Scores may be canceled as a result of any compromises in the Registration, Testing, Test Scoring, or Test Score Reporting Processes, or Group Irregularities as described in Section 23 of the Candidate Agreement. [...] 1. Scores may be canceled because of circumstances beyond your control, such as faulty test materials. In such cases, we will notify law schools of the cancellation and arrange a retest at no charge on the next regularly scheduled test date. 2. LSAC will investigate and reserves the right to cancel any test score if, in our opinion, there is any question as to its validity. When the validity of a score is questioned by LSAC, we will notify the test taker of the reasons for questioning the score and we will provide options appropriate to the specific circumstances. [...] registration fees for the canceled test and no refund of your registration fees will be issued to you by LSAC. The test proctor is not required to give you any notice or warning if the test proctor observes any prohibited behavior or suspected prohibited behavior.

evidences.title: Washington State Courts - JIS-Link
evidences.content: to file a document or record a proceeding held. "STCL" resolutions and completions are not counted in the caseload statistics. As an alternative to the "STCL" completion code, the appropriate resolution and completion codes can be used so that the legal record more accurately reflects the case outcome (see Historical Resolution and Completion Codes in Appendix E). If this method is used, it is important to enter the correct resolution and completion dates so that these events are not (re)counted in the caseload statistics and do not distort pending caseload reports. | | [...] ## Superior Court Statistical Reporting Manual 7. CASES RESOLVED Case processing time standards are published in the Washington Rules of Court. The time standards identify three major milestones in the life of a case: filing, resolution, and completion. Case "resolution" occurs when the case is "tried, settled, or otherwise concluded;" that is, resolution is defined as the adjudication or settlement of all issues in a case (e.g., court decision, notice of settlement, oral order). Case "completion" occurs when all necessary dispositive documents have been filed with the clerk. [...] | | Superior Court Statis...
